reviews.review_title: Peak but I wish a couple of things
reviews.review_description: Sandbox mode get any weapon at any time including speicial weapons have special things like infinity health and a multiplayer mode just make areas harder change the story to have a brother new voice lines and make mini bosses and normal bosses harder oh and make puzzles to people but that’s probably asking too much🥺

I love this game. It was so fun to play and I  one hundred percented it fully the game left  me wanting to know more and see more from this franchise but some of the criticisms are justified it's it's very obvious the people who made this made zombie games. you travel through so many cramped caves and it does get repetitive but they have proven that they can make big open areas that don't get boring. like in the arena and some of the ambush zones opening the world up more could also lead to a lot of cool possibilities like seeing bosses outside of their boss arenas seeing the behemoths more, maybe having to hide from them also tracking the behemoths as well i am not saying this needs to be a open world game at all i love what we got and I fell in love with this amazing world. What I think all the problems with skydances, behemoth boils down to is i and a lot of the people just really want to see more of this world through the architecture, the three factions through the bixby behemoths through everything and I hope skydance games does not give up on this style of game. And if they make more games in this world or a remaster I'll definitely be playing them

The fast movement only works when it wants to. The story line is very weak. The environments are boring after 10 minutes. It's repetitive. Many parts are just copies of other well known games but not executed as well. The killing of the first beast where he just stood there without exposing the plate to hook and pull him on to the broken mass was just frustrating. I went back to the same scene several times and the same thing happened. When a game leaves you frustrated and bored then it's time to uninstall it. It wasn't' cheap but unfortunately I'd played more than 2 crappy hours so money down the drain for glitchy vacuous rubbish.

reviews.review_title: One of the most AWESOME VR games
reviews.review_description: This feels like they took everything good about the combat of Saints and Sinners and said “You know what? Lets make that even better” and then made Shadows of the Colossus mixed with the style of Dark Souls in VR. The sheer scale of the Behemoths only works in VR, during a late game fight with the deer Behemoth (Dreddstag), I looked up and thought “You want me to fight the Burj Khalifa?!” and then I did. Every single Behemoth fight in the game isn’t really difficult, but it’s more about the spectacle and presentation, which is FANTASTICALLY mastered here. Easily a 10 hour campaign that I will come back to for an annual playthrough. There is a bit of jank, especially with the sokoban puzzles that are in the game, but once you get past that, easily one of the coolest VR games there is.

This game was so fun on first playthrough without any spoliers, this game is the best story game on first try, although their isn’t much replay value I have still beat the game like 7 times with my first game taking well over 13h with my speedrun under 2-3. Best vr game for first play

reviews.review_title: Very Good Game but hard for noobs
reviews.review_description: I've played this game through about 2 and a half times but if you're new and cant kill the first behemoth u should take a YouTube tutorial first before you rage and dash back if you see a read mark or hear a shnnk but i feel this game can get boring if you play it for 60h+ since I'm unemployment 🤫 in all GREAT AMAZING GAME but needs sandbox or just more content updates like a part two😜

It's a shame that this game seemed to have a rough launch, as it clearly affected its scores which should definitely be higher. I was initially hesitating to get it due to reviews after the release, but I decided to get it now after all the patches and I was not disappointed.
The graphics are good, and the presentation is great. The campaign reminds me of the God of War games. The melee is decent once you get the hang of it and going "Bersek mode" and cutting the enemies in half is super cool. The grappling hook and bow mechanics are also great. I love how you can use the grappling hook to pull enemies from the edge of a cliff, or to remove their helmets to then headshot them with the bow (I wish these devs made another story driven game more focused on these mechanics instead of melee, since they were awesome). The game also gave me fear of highs on several occasions that you need to traverse those big environments with the grappling hook (I wish more VR games had these kinds of high altitude environments). The Behemoth fights are also good, especially the second one (where you have to use the bow). I had an issue though that I lost my legendary sword (this shouldn't occur since you need the legendary weapons to proceed, so I had to load an earlier save). It's definitely something that needs fixing, but it's not a deal breaker if you pay attention if you have all your legendary weapons before saving. Not many story driven games on the platform have this level of presentation and campaign, so in my opinion this game is a must buy.

We’d been playing it for a few weeks and it was great fun at first. But now every time we try to launch the game, it just crashes and kicks us out. I’ve tried contacting the game company and haven’t had any response, and after a quick search online it seems like quite a few other people are having the same issue. It’s frustrating, especially considering how expensive the game is.

This game is enjoyable UNTIL you have to fight a Behemoth. Why?  Because for some ungodly reason, the developers force you to click the left stick down and HOLD it to run!  This is a terrible control choice an one that risks damaging the controller.  Throughout the regular quest, you don’t ever have to move that quickly, an even when you do, there is a dash button, but it is beyond absurd that the game forces you to nearly destroy your controller AND your thumb just to run quickly enough to defeat the Behemoths.

reviews.review_title: Good game but I can’t can’t get in
reviews.review_description: I ain’t wanna give this game a bad review because of a small bug cause it’s real good game but I’ve tried everything restarting the game my headset and closing it but nothing worked

At first, the game was kind of hard and it was a bit of a struggle cause I didn’t understand the context clues there were to complete certain levels, but the storyline of the game is very good. Honestly, it’s one of my favorite games on VR cause the graphics are really good too And the little trophies that you can find super cool and all of the plot twists are just amazing. I would totally recommend buying this game if you like things like RPG‘s fighting games and stuff like that. ￼In conclusion this game was freaking peak. ￼

Behemoth user cloud saving, so if you are getting the error where the game will not boot, uninstall the game and then reinstall the game and it should be fixed. Your saved the game will still be there. It’s a pain in the butt, but it will work.

Otherwise, amazing game!

I wouldn't deduct any stars from my review because this is one of my favorite games. However, during the final Behemoth, King Ragnar, I got really frustrated—I think I was facing a glitch. I probably grappled his arm about 20 times, and he kept breaking it. After watching a YouTube video, I realized I was doing everything correctly, so I had to restart the game to succeed. It still took me a few tries; I finally managed to do it when I grappled the back of his arm. That might have been the solution, but I had tried that earlier with no luck. The second frustrating part was how difficult it was to escape when he swept his arm later in the fight. When I had to push forward while blocking with both hands, I just couldn't get close to him. I used my strength and kept trying to move forward, but I wouldn't shift an inch. I had to grapple onto those hooks on the ground to get near him, all while blocking his attacks with my sword. Then, I almost ended up inside that giant zit and couldn't break it, so I moved to another hook and finally succeeded. This struggle made the last boss fight far from fun—it was just plain frustrating.
One of the other bosses in the game I beat simply by touching my sword to her shield, which seemed like a clear glitch. Once, in a different fight area, the doors wouldn't open after I had defeated all the enemies. I searched around for a way out for quite a while before realizing it was likely a glitch, so I restarted the game. 
Some of the opponents get stuck in place, and I even encountered a few that were halfway embedded in the ground. I experience this type of issue in most games, and it's not a big deal if it’s not frequent, and it wasn't. My main concern remains the frustrations I described earlier.

NEVER IN MY YEARS OF LIFE HAVE I FOUND A GAME WITH BOSS FIGHTS SO GOOD. Walking up to the first boss (shacklehide) and seeing a fricking 500 feet monster is the best feeling, your like “time to kill this beast” or maybe your like “I’m friggin cooked”. Either way I love how the game doesn’t exactly tell you how to kill the behemoths, you gotta figure it out with what you’ve learned, though if you take to long it’ll help you out so don’t worry. The nightscrapper boss is the best boss fight I’ve ever experienced in my life. Same the the biggest one sorry I forgot his name. Falling off the dragon and grappling back or hanging on for dear life is awesome. 20/10 game. One thing I found slightly boring was how long it takes to get to each boss but with the new update you can just do the bosses

This game is fun, I haven’t had any technical problems or crashing of the game. The story is decent but if I had to change something, I’d make the behemoth boss battles a little harder. I personally think they’re  too easy but still enjoyable!

I loved walking dead saints and sinners, so when I found out this game was made by the same people i had to buy it. BUT although I love this game I do have a few complaints, I think the combat against bosses (not behemoths) is far too easy, all you have to do is activate your strength boost and grab a sword and axe and then the bosses are cooked. And enemies die from a stab in the head, ik its realistic but it makes fighting enemies a little too easy. But besides that the game is amazing, and the behemoth fights are awesome, the visuals are good, and the environments are amazing. I think this is better than any other vr story game ive played.

reviews.review_title: This is the best game of all time
reviews.review_description: I know people say that a lot but I've had vr for over 4 years now I've had hundreds of games and THIS GAME IS THE BEST out of all of them.😁
Bro, the gore is insane even though it’s £31.99 it’s DEFINITELY WORTH IT

I've completed this game twice, gotten all the achievements, and I can say it's one of the best VR games of all time. The boss fights are reminiscent of Shadow of Colossus, but in VR, they're just incredibly good. They're the best boss fights ever. 
The game has three types of gameplay: exploration, combat, and boss fights. Some people complain about the exploration, but it's really good. Simple puzzles, ropes, climbing, and finding bits of a compelling story, understanding what happened in this dark kingdom—it's really great. The battles with medium enemies are also very good, and you have a lot of options, like using a bow or a sword, activating a power and throwing enemies onto spikes, and much more. And finally, the battles with the human bosses—on Barbarian difficulty, it's like Dark Souls, and you have to get used to it, I love it. The behemoth bosses—no comment, they're gorgeous.
Good game but stopped loading and kept kicking me off but I uninstalled it and reinstalled it and now it’s working again so hope this works for others with the same problem 👍
Game is really good but like everyone else the game just won't open,  its like once the refund window closes the game just breaks.
We a second game
This game had cool views fun combat and a nice story it was really fun to play
The game mechanics are terrible. I got stuck on some rocks very early in game with no way around

This game is amazing, got it for half off on sale. The fighting style is AMAZING. I love how specific weapons have a certain weight depending on how big it is.

100% The look and feel of the game is THE BEST out of all the games I have ever played.
I wish the creators would make a second game, because I got over the campaign in a couple days and loved it so much that I was very pleased to find out, after you finish the campaign you can start a new game where you start the campaign over but keep everything you already have acquired in the first
campaign 

There's also the behemoth trial where you fight all the behemoth in order and an arena mode where you fight the smaller enemies in an arena.

This game is cheap and affordable for a story game where you can fight and lose overall I give this game five star if I can give it more, I would I think it’s worth getting and the behemoths are really realistic ￼

reviews.review_title: Good game but needs a few tweaks
reviews.review_description: So the game is good, love the story line and ideas for the game, the fighting mechanics is a little to be desired, I feel like you can't hit anyone realistically, swinging is janky and two handed long swords always veer to the right too much, maybe take some ideas from blade and sorcery the melee mechanics are perfect, other than that loved the game.

I enjoy playing the game. The main story is decent, and the fighting is fun. I think it is odd that people will sometime say it is good until the first behemoth, but fighting them is the whole point of the game. I love pulling enemies off ledges with the grappling hook thingy.

Re purchased this game as seen it in a sale, along with quest games optimiser to smooth out the graphics it actually looks really really good.

Combat has an odd weight feel that for me doesnt feel right at all, sometimes you swing and its like your weapon is on a short string so doesnt impact when you hand is there.

Played until the first Behemoth fight... now visually with the scale it epic (but i had already seen this done to perfection in Asgards Wrath.

Whoever thought the combat with the Behemoth was good needs help.

When you finally figure out wtf your supposed to do (after dying around 3 times on the easiest difficulty)

I had the plan to rush in, use the grapple to remove the thing and make the first sword strike.

It then said to climb its ankle, which after running around its feet dodging and getting smacked with no view of it coming as with it being that big and all you can see is a foot taking up the screen I was nicely smacked by him swinging the ball around still.

I finally got onto his leg and started climbing, took out the second blob, it through me off, he fell and killed me.

Ill never play it again.

How that is supposed to be fun I have no idea.

This game is peak, and the boss fights are sooo fun. The 3rd one was definitely my favorite. The graphics and combat system is so good too, plus I love how you can cut people in half. I finished the game and the story is so good. So Thats my review and if your VR isnt that good in performance you might not be able to play it but still the is a great game.

.. but as always, they’re doing a cd projekt red..means, it’s fun, it’s ambitious-but only gets better over time and the next updates. like walking dead: saints & sinners did.

completely worth it now though:)

reviews.review_title: ONE OF THE BEAT COMBAT GAMES
reviews.review_description: This game was really enjoyable for me because it was cinematic and always full of action. There were tons of weapons and enemies to fight with and collect making this game filled with non-stop action. The grapple hook is awesome and fighting bosses makes this game 10x better. I reccomend buying this game for the reasons. And also if your game crashes while your loading it up just reinstall the game.

The game does not work. Crashes on launch, error: vr head set not found. Installed it twice and tried with pc link, air link and virtual desktop. Nothing works. All other games work just fine. The same issue with steam version. Please fix it or return my money. There is a review about it with hundred likes already
Its a great game but after awhile of playing and finally getting off vr it just doesnt allow me to join the game just kicking me out instantly
The best game i've ever played.
My game keeps crashing every time I join I’m hoping the developer see our comments because this is happening to many people I’m trying to stay hopeful that this will be fixed shortly
Peak
I was only able to play the game for a day, and then every time I clicked on the game it crashed.

At first I was only going to give this 3 stars due to lacking left handed support - a real oversi.ght which surely could be amended. Not many games omit this anymore. 

But I still have to give it 4 stars. It's wonderfully gritty and immersion and the combat is some of the.most fun fantasy fighting I've played. 
So close to being a real gem.

But... left handed support is very much needed please!

Bought this some months ago, come to launch this game, and find it won't   load , then came up with a statement that have no clue what it means, or understand, saying something like, to many , somethings, and it wont create  a loop. I know sounds crazy, any help please.

reviews.review_title: Love it but I have some requests.
reviews.review_description: Listen. I do like the game a lot but the main problem I have is that I would have liked the game to be open world more like shadow of the colossus too instead of just four behemoths maybe more. I do like the game don’t get me wrong but having the game open world or even multiplayer in like the second game if they make a second behemoth would be fun. But yeah a fully fledged open world game, maybe multiplayer maybe not depending, and just adding more behemoths instead of four maybe like 6 or 10 but I know it is a lot of work but still. I would love to have something like that. Definitely would be worth the wait but the game is pretty good for a first time making something like this.

reviews.review_title: Graphics are great but a bit glitchy
reviews.review_description: I have played this game for around half a year now and have over 200+ hours on the game across six different saves and half beaten the game 12 times I have played it on both quest 2 and quest 3s and I can honestly say its my favorite linear storyline game I've ever played I played some of skydances games but to be honest they couldn't compare to the graphics and the challenge that behemoth is. Although there are some glitches that are hard to fix. I am here to help I have noticed some of the reviews talking about how it won't let them in the game and it crashes everytime they try to start it so before you play behemoth you should know that under any circumstance DO NOT QUIT WHILE IN THE LOADING SCREENS Doing so will result in you corrupting the save file i don't know why it does this but its happened to me 4 times so please heed this warning and if it does happen you can either delete your save data and put in a another save and if you don't know how to do that just delete and reinstall the game I know its 28GB but trust me its worth it. Overall I think behemoth is definitely worth a try if you want a game where it really shows the scale of the world building and with beautiful scenery and gory aftermath of your rampage it is definitely a must play.
At first it was great, then it crashed and isnt loading in anymore. Let me play please this game is amazing

It’s perfect the graphics the gameplay there are only 3 things that kinda suck

1. the cost is a bit much but it’s worth for this game

2.the time it takes to load, it takes a lot longer then most games 

3. there is no 3 I lied

My favorite vr game right would be 5 stars if the elk would just fall over
Like holy I spent 4 hours thinking I did the fight wrong but im not the elk just wont fall over I tie its ankle things then she says find a place to climb but there is no place to climb if its still walking. Can you please fix this

Well, I had downloaded for this past Christmas sale, and defeated the first Behemoth.. then a DLC was released.. now the game won't even open. I had to uninstall, got back in and everything was lost.. now it's back to not even opening again.. I'm trying to install again. I want to keep it and not get a refund... I have a 512 gig Quest3, with plenty of storage... so i can support the game
I heard it's really good, but I'm saying if ur internet sucks, or ur headset sucks don't buy it, but if both of ur internet and oculus are good, then get it. But mine sucks✌️🫩

I just finished Behemoths story today and BOY OH BOY, let me tell you.

Behemoth is one of the best VR games I have ever played, right up there with twd:S&S and Bonelab.

The combat feels amazing, the story and graphics are great, and the behemoth boss fights are the coolest thing ever!

I did run into a few glitches fighting the third boss, but otherwise, absolutely fantastic, keep up the good work Skydance!

After more than a year and roughly 12 hours of on and off gameplay I finally reached the end. This game is doing almost everything right. The visuals, gameplay/puzzles, combat and fantastic audio design really hits the spot. Thanks!
Enjoyed it.  Good bosses.  Good gameplay. Good story.  Recommended.
Energy bar ruins it all

I have enjoyed the game overall and it's def a workout as you hack n slash your way through the levels. The boss fights are kind of insane and can be tough. I had some issues with it glitching quite a bit and have had to restart the game a couple of times to progress which is why I gave it 4 stars instead of 5 but overall it is a great game.
The game itself is amazing. Behemoths are good even got over my fear of heights
Just get the game bro it’s peak
If elden ring and darksouls had a baby

So i played the Walking Dead vr and i was like "surely the devs cant cook harder than this" but i was wrong, just beat the final boss and let me tell you, i would do ANYTHING to wipe my memory of this game and experience it for the first time again, this really pushed the limits of what a vr game can be. I seriously enjoyed every second of this masterpiece , please keep making games like this.
The combat in this game is incredible, I wish we could utilize it more though, maybe like a sanbox, or a free play multiplayer even? Still the best game I have played to date.
I love gameplay I love the story and i love the graphics
The game isn’t terrible. It can be a little buggy and repetitive. It did have a lot of promise tho and I really enjoyed the fight with then second behemoth. The story line isn’t bad either.

The combat is very satisfying and fun, although it takes a while to get used to the difficulty at first. There are only 4 behemoths in the game, but those fights are some of the most fun i've ever had in vr. The story and atmosphere are amazing in my opinion, the world building is good and the characters are enjoyable.

Would certainly recommend if you like challenging combat, fun bosses, and a dark fantasy atmosphere.

Writing this review upsets me. Skydance's Behemoth's behemoth fights are masterpieces that are some of the best combat ive done in vr. They're a little jank but the main 3 really capture that shadow of the colossus feeling.

Its a shame then to say that the game around these fights is awful.

If they had gone full shadow of the colossus, given us like 5 behemoths and just made the in-between puzzle sections, it would be a good game. Sadly the human to human combat is awful, dialing that jank to 100. The game actively punishes you for engaging with the combat system with enemies having nonsensical animations to a arbitrary stamina system which slows the game down for no reason.

For the first half of the game fights tend to go just as wailing on the enemy in strength mode till they die. In the second you do the same but for bosses you can skip all of them just by pulling their helmet off and killing them in one hit. Once again engaging in normal combat feels like fighting the game.

The story is fine, its generic, basically just a narrative to get you between behemoth fights.

The game gets 3 stars solely for how good the 3 main behemoth fights are. If they weren't there id be hard pressed to give 1
Game stopped working

I had high hopes for this game as Saints and Sinners came from the same developer. The world is extremely linear and finding “hidden” objects is like a toddler’s Easter egg hunt. Speaking of toddlers, the human enemies have the intelligence of one, immediately forgetting you’re there once out of sight or just run in circles because they don’t realize they can simply climb a stairwell to get to you. It’s weird that there are no weapon stats, so you just pick up random weapons and try to guess it might be stronger? Then one sword broke on me which makes the “no stats” thing even more bizarre. The grappling hook seemed cool at first but revealed to be more of a gimmick than anything as it can only be used in specific instances. In all transparency I quit before fighting the first behemoth. I had to force myself to keep playing to even get to that point. Such a disappointment. Graphics are good if nothing else.
It gives you like 5-6 hours, and then you finish.  I'd recommend adding a sandbox mode where you can spawn whatever you want. It's fun, tho.

reviews.review_title: For the company if you could fix this is
reviews.review_description: Every time I join it seems to just kick me out of the game really good game but it's not working I just keep getting kicked no hate

How the heck does this game only have 4.1 stars?  I have to admit I was on the fence about it given the mixed reactions. But then I bought it and, finally, got around to playing it and it was a joy. The climbing was cool. The bosses were extremely impressive - just marveling at the scale of the behemoths!  The visuals were amazing (some views I wondered at for more than a bit) and the game design was overall impressive. In short - I am so extra very happy that I bought this game and I think you will be too!

If you are somebody that loved shadow of the colossus, you have to play it. Its incredible! The gameplay is a bit janky sometimes. But all in all its a must have title. Hope they will make a sequel or a soc vr remake. Would definitely buy it!

Played an hour today on Q3 and here is the initial impression. 

It's pretty, framerate is steady, sound design is phenomenal, the combat is ... Easy. So far.. I think the first region is very tutorial... Voice acting is decent, and all things UI (inventory, weapons) is butter smooth just like Walking Dead. Skydance rules, this game rules, I'd pay full price.

Why this and Asgard 2 have low ratings is beyond me. They play great.
Is very good but the game but the swinging in the game is a bit janke withe the collos axe

Ltr the best game in therm of quality, gore, physics, history mode, lore and world building. Just maybe add a better sand box like we can spawn the number of mob we want not like wave sand box like battle talent and maybe I say maybe a multiplayer and this would be perfect

Honestly one of the most emersive and thriller games. The fights were incredibly unique and fun, the lore was interesting, and the plot twist was well done. Seriously one of my favorite games to date.

reviews.review_title: Love the game here’s my problem
reviews.review_description: You all have a moment glitch that makes the character slide when your joycon isn’t moving I don’t have controller drift as I checked before I did this but other than that your game is amazing and it’s one of my favorite vr games right now

reviews.review_title: Amazing game, but… (Notes to the devs)
reviews.review_description:
Fun game, but gets annoying and frustrating. Not because of difficulty, but because of some of these things. So here’s a list of things I believe you should add/fix
1. Having to Reload the map every time you die.
This gets VERY annoying and is always the reason I stop playing.
2. Nearly no chance against specific enemies.
Sometimes, when fighting the first mini boss enemy (that’s the only name I could come up with), it’s a struggle to block their attacks, making me die nearly every time I fight them. Yes, I’m hitting their sword, no it doesn’t count as a block apparently. This might just be because I’m bad, but still. It’s also annoying dying to a dagger getting thrown at you, as those are very unpredictable, which is good, but you should at least have a chance.

I also agree with the other people saying you ruined the game with the weapon purchasing thing, and weapon breaking. It’s just so ANNOYING!
Please. I beg, at least fix the map reloading thing.
Overall though, I want to say. FIX YOUR GAME!!!
This game is not worth the price tag of 40 dollars, like 40! that is excessive I have seen games for half the price just as good!!

I just finished the campaign and I don’t know what to say. When you fight the behemoths the scale is perfect and the combat is grate. If your looking for a game with good graphics,good combat,and a good story,and dialogue then please by all means get this game￼! It is one of my all time favorites.

The developers did a great job on this game🫵🏻👍🏻 keep it up!

reviews.review_title: Love it but three small issues😩
reviews.review_description: I loved scaling the behemoths like shacklehide(the walrus one) or nightscraper( the bat) and it felt like fighting a hekalis from blade’s & sorcery. I thought it was nice that you can keep the helmet and weapons of the minibosses too. The climbing and grappling were quite smooth as well. My only issues was that when I fought the mad marauder for the first time after I broke his helmet he got stuck in the ground and I had to restart. It took time to get used to combat and controls. I feel like they could have made a full model for Wren(our character) instead of just arms too. Overall it was quite fun and I would recommend it if you’re into games like these. But I haven’t had much time to really look into the game so experiences might differ from mine.

I’ll be absolutely brutally honest; the combat is great, but not the BEST. HOWEVER! The story is the best thing I’ve ever seen, well written that’ll last you a while. The character development with the knowledge and trust being thrown around is an amazing touch to the plot
i mean, the game looks cool it just isn’t loading at all

This game goes to show vrs full potential, there is nothing like fighting th behemoths for the first time. I absolutely love the combat in this game it really puts your skills to the test. Before i got behemoth i always player blade and sorcery so the change of combat being pretty easy to having to parry and dodge was amazing, this is by far one of my favourite vr games

The game used to be one of my favorites. It was fun to play while listening to music once you completed the game on arena mode because it made you feel like a god and you didn’t have to worry about anything. But now after the update, they ruined it. The new maps suck, the weapons break, you have to collect coins in order to get new weapons, and worst of all they make you complete the arena mode before you can just free play it. It wouldn’t be as much of a problem if you could get all those things back, but you can’t. Also I’ve been trying for about 4 months to beat the stupid arena mode to unlock free play and I just can’t do it. If you’re gonna add that feature, at least make it possible. And every time I make it to the very end to defeat the bosses they hit me with one swing and I immediately die. A solid run until the end takes about an hour. So that’s one hour out of your day wasted. It sucks. And yes I tried turning the difficulty down to tenderfoot, but it won’t let you. It stays on standard, which by the way, should not be impossible. Just take these features away. Arena mode used to be just fun to play whenever you finished the story mode. Make it like that again. No one wants the weapon breaking and coin mechanic, and no one wants to waste their time on that stupid challenge AFTER they completed the story mode. It completely ruined a five star game for me. Fix the game devs. I’m so pissed off. If you fix the game, and make it how it used to be, I will change this review back to five stars. FIX YOUR STUPID GAME DEVS
